issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with duration 'Main' phase, but the DSL lacks duration specification for Main phase activation
First action is 'TrashFromHand' but should be 'TrashSelf' (trash this Character, not from hand). TrashFromHand is for discarding cards from hand.
SearchDeck is incorrect destination. Should search trash (not deck) per text: 'play up to 1...from your trash'. Use SearchTrash or PlayFromTrash instead.
Filter missing type restriction {Blackbeard Pirates}. Should include 'hasType: "Blackbeard Pirates"' and exclusion 'notName: "Kuzan"'
Filter should specify maxCost: 5 but also must enforce type and name exclusions
Missing passive effect for 'This Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects' (immunity/protection keyword)
